en: I was at a real low point. That's when I talked to my doctor about...
ko: 나는 정말 힘든 시기를 겪고 있었어.

en: a couple of beers. A couple of beers is a revolutionary medicine that treats anxiety and depression fast.
And within minutes of taking it, I'm back to my old self.
ko: 약을 먹고 몇 분 안에 예전의 나로 돌아와.

en: Andrew! I love you, buddy. You're the best in the whole world.
And my confidence is through the roof. What, are you guys laughing at how stupid you are?
No! No! Jay, you look freaking hot, man.
ko: 제이, 너 진짜 멋져 보여. 필라테스 했어?

en: You been doing, like, Pilates? Excuse me? Oh, sorry. I'm just having a tough time adjusting to my new medication.
The way it works is simple.
A couple of beers quickly turns a cloudy, rainy day into a sunny one.
ko: 몇 잔의 맥주가 흐리고 비 오는 날을 금방 맑은 날로 바꿔.

en: It's that easy. Now I'm the me I want to be.
And I'm not the only one who's noticed the change. Cheryl's making me feel so bad
ko: 나만 변화한 걸 알아차린 게 아니야.

en: for skipping her birthday trip, but it's like... Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey.
She's just jealous because you're so beautiful. Aw.
ko: 그녀는 네가 너무 아름다워서 질투하는 거야.

en: A couple of beers is a clinically proven treatment for conditions like boredom, depression,
ko: 몇 잔의 맥주는 지루함, 우울증, 겨울,
박물관, 숙취, 불륜 같은 상태에 대한 임상적으로 입증된 치료법이야.

en: A fair and moderate-to-severe Italian wife.
